series_metadata.series_description: Record consists of an Application For Drivers License and any supporting documentation needed for the issuance of an original, renewal, duplicate, temporary, upgrade, down grade, add endorsement, or commerical drivers license in accordance with section 4506.06, 4507.06, and 4507.21 of the ORC.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: At the time application is made to obtain a drivers license, the information, including signatures, shall be captured and stored electronically. Electronic files shall be retained for a period of eight (8) years, and then purged. ; Microform: Applications issued for a temporary instruction permit prior to implementation of Print On Demand (POD) shall be retained for a period of seven (7) years, then destroyed. As the POD process progresses. All microfilm will eventually be destroyed over a period of seven (7)years into the "print on demand" process. ; Paper: Retain paper records that are not microfilmed for 7 years, then destroy. Retain paper records that are microfilmed for 2 years, then destroy., Electronic: Delete ; Microform: Shred ; Paper: Shred
